zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk於1390年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾時，他的父親John Moncreiffe, 5th of Moncreiffe  of that Ilk41歲，母親Mona Balweary43歲。他與Katherine Murray結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1465年6月15日在英國蘇格蘭享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk于1390年出生在英国苏格兰培爾时，他的父亲John Moncreiffe, 5th of Moncreiffe  of that Ilk41岁，母亲Mona Balweary43岁。他与Katherine Murray结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1465年6月15日在英国苏格兰享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moncrieffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Moncrieff  . This form of the surname is found mainly in Jamaica.

variants.name: Moncrieff
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Moncrief  . This is the more common form in Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk was born in 1390, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Moncreiffe, 5th of Moncreiffe  of that Ilk, was 41 and his mother, Mona Balweary, was 43. He married Katherine Murray. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 15 June 1465, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk est né en 1390, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Moncreiffe, 5th of Moncreiffe  of that Ilk, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mona Balweary, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Murray. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1465, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk 1390 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Moncreiffe, 5th of Moncreiffe  of that Ilk 41 und seine Mutter Mona Balweary 43. Er hat Katherine Murray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 15. Juni 1465 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk è nato il nel 1390 nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Moncreiffe, 5th of Moncreiffe  of that Ilk, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Mona Balweary, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Murray. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 15 giugno 1465, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilkが1390年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Moncreiffe, 5th of Moncreiffe  of that Ilkは41歳，母Mona Balwearyは43歳であった。Katherine Murrayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1465年6月15日にイギリススコットランドで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk(이)가 1390년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Moncreiffe, 5th of Moncreiffe  of that Ilk(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Mona Balweary(은)는 43세였다. 그는 Katherine Murray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1465년 6월 15일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk nasceu em 1390, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Moncreiffe, 5th of Moncreiffe  of that Ilk, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mona Balweary, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Murray. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1465, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk родился в 1390 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Moncreiffe, 5th of Moncreiffe  of that Ilk было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mona Balweary, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Murray. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 15 июня 1465 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk nació en 1390, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Moncreiffe, 5th of Moncreiffe  of that Ilk, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mona Balweary, tenía 43 años.
